name: Main Notifications
description: Inbox-shaped surface for two parallel notification streams — 'What's New' (system updates) and 'Keywords' (keyword-matched posts). The active 'Keywords' tab is filter-heavy: users pre-narrow by keyword and channel before scanning. Each row points back to a post and uses a bell-in-coral leading glyph as the row-type marker.

top.note: page variant — leading menu, centered title, trailing settings cog + profile.

props.title: Recruiters are looking at your profile
props.body: Turn on visibility to start getting messages.

promo.note: Warm-surface promo callout sitting between the tabs and the filter row. Carries an illustration on the right; color pair travels together (AGENTS.md rule 2).

filters.note: Filter row. A trailing `button/text` 'Manage Keywords' lives at the end of the row — it is a navigation hint paired with filter scope, not a filter itself. Do not merge into the chip row as another chip.

body.note: Hairline separators between rows, not full dividers. Bell-in-coral leading glyph is the row-type marker — not per-row state. Each row routes back to a post.

rules: 'Manage Keywords' is `button/text` at the end of the chip row — not a chip. Do not merge into the filter set.
Bell-in-coral leading glyph is the row-type marker, not state. Do not vary it per row to signal read/unread.
Demo strings render English per AGENTS.md rule 7, even though the source pattern is Korean.
